title: anoectochilus purpureus
intro: Anoectochilus purpureus, also known as the purple orchid or purple pipit, is a species of orchid native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Anoectochilus purpureus include the potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its use as an anti-aging agent to promote skin health. Anoectochilus purpureus is often prepared as a decoction or infused in herbal tea, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
